completed_steps.summary: Classified as monorepo (Nx) with 1 cohesive backend part; ~100 Nx projects, 23 rule-processor projects
Existing docs: root CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md, .ai/ canonical rules, generated per-rule READMEs
Tech stack: TypeScript 5.9.3 on Node 24.14.1, AWS Lambda, Nx 22.6.1, Vitest 4.1.0, Zod 4.3.6
Documented rule-processor contract (RuleInput/RuleOutput) and data models (document/methodology types)
Supporting docs written (overview, api-contracts, data-models, dev/deploy guides)

findings.project_classification: Nx monorepo, single cohesive TypeScript backend; AWS Lambda rule processors for the BOLD methodology framework
findings.technology_stack: TypeScript 5.9.3 / Node 24.14.1 / AWS Lambda / Nx 22.6.1 / Vitest 4.1.0 / Zod 4.3.6

resume_instructions: Workflow complete. Re-run document-project and choose 're-scan' or 'deep-dive' to update.
